title: erigeron othonnifolius
intro: Erigeron othonnifolius, also known as Dwarf Fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Erigeron othonnifolius include its ability to reduce fever, soothe respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Erigeron othonnifolius can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
